name: A Grassy Field
description:
You are travelling across a great grassy field.  The wind blows softly,
causing the ripe ends of the grass stalks to bob lazily back and forth.  To the
north you spy what appears to be some sort of temple, its great white walls
blazing with the light of the sun.

exits.description: You see the entrance to the temple.

extra_descriptions.description: Looks like an average grass stalk.  You pluck one and put it in your mouth.
